title: Eaglercraft
description: Minecraft 1.12.2 running entirely in your browser. Build, explore, and survive in full blocky glory.

title: Drift Boss
description: Tap to drift around endless corners. One button, infinite skill ceiling. How far can you go?

title: Snow Rider 3D
description: Sled down a never-ending snowy mountain. Dodge obstacles, collect gifts, and chase your high score.

title: Infinite Craft
description: Combine elements to discover new ones. Start with fire, water, wind, and earth — the rest is up to you.
Slide tiles to combine numbers and reach 2048. Addictively simple, brutally hard.

title: Minesweeper
description: Clear the minefield without detonating any bombs. A timeless classic.

title: Chess
description: The ultimate game of strategy. Play against the computer at any skill level.

title: Slither.io
description: Grow your snake by eating glowing orbs. Avoid other snakes or you're done!

title: Dino Run
description: The beloved Chrome offline dinosaur game. Jump over cacti, dodge pterodactyls.

title: Sudoku
description: Fill the 9×9 grid so every row, column, and box contains 1–9. Pure logic.

title: Mahjong
description: Match tiles to clear the board in this ancient Chinese tile-based game.

title: Pac-Man
description: Chomp pellets and dodge ghosts in the most iconic arcade game of all time.
